ddls:
CREATE TABLE "earthquakes" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earthquake event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the earthquake event */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the earthquake event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the earthquake event */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the earthquake event */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the earthquake event */,
  "nst" INTEGER /* Number of seismic stations used to determine the earthquake location */,
  "gap" INTEGER /* Smallest azimuthal gap (in degrees) between seismic stations */,
  "dmin" REAL /* Minimum distance from the epicenter to the nearest seismic station */,
  "rms" REAL /* Root mean square of the horizontal uncertainty of the earthquake epicenter */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Time the earthquake event was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location of the earthquake event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event status */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of data quality */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track updates and changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the earthquake event */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the earthquake */,
  "tsunami_warning" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a tsunami warning was issued for the earthquake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earthquakes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earthquakes_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES event_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earthquakes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earthquakes_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "place" TEXT /* Name of the place where the earthquake occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the earthquake occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the earthquake occurred */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the earthquake occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation in a standardized format */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "nearest_city_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest city in kilometers */,
  "nearest_city_name" TEXT /* Name of the nearest city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who reviewed the event */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was reviewed */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the earthquake event */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquakes ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the external data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the earthquake event */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the external data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquakes ("event_id")
)
